navigational map for the Crimson Hexagonal Archive Google critique
kernel_50_100_words: God-King Google is the canonical public surface for the Crimson Hexagonal Archive's critique of Google as a semantic-political mediation regime. It navigates 750+ DOI-anchored deposits across five developmental phases, eight analytical strata, and three poles of inquiry (theory, evidence, instruments). Companion surfaces include the Term Index (1,349 terms), the AI Overview captures gallery, and the Wound Gauge instrument. Author: Lee Sharks. Founding deposit: alexanarch #1078 (AXN:0447.PHILOLOGICAL). The Overview decides what is real; the archive documents that decision.
